title: Keyboard Symbols: Copy & Paste ⌘ ⌥ ⇧ Mac & PC Key Glyphs
meta_description: Copy and paste keyboard symbols — Mac modifier keys (⌘ ⌥ ⇧ ⌃), editing keys (⏎ ⌫ ⇥), and arrow and special key glyphs. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
hero_tagline: Command, option, shift, and every other Mac and PC key glyph for writing clean shortcuts. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
intro: Documenting keyboard shortcuts reads far better with the real key glyphs than with spelled-out names. This library gathers the Mac modifier symbols such as command (⌘), option (⌥), shift (⇧), and control (⌃); the editing and navigation keys like return, backspace, and tab; and the arrow and special-key glyphs that complete a shortcut. Click any character to copy it for documentation, tutorials, or app interfaces.
